mapper.sql: select a.apply_id, a.process_type, case a.process_type when 'leave' then '请假申请' when 'expense' then '报销申请' else a.process_type end as process_type_label, a.title, a.form_no, a.applicant_id, a.applicant_name, a.current_handler_id, a.current_handler_name, a.status, case a.status when '审批中' then '审批中' when '已完成' then '已完成' when '已驳回' then '已驳回' else a.status end as status_label, a.reason, a.amount, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.submit_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time from oa_workflow_apply a
mapper.insert: insert into oa_workflow_apply ( process_type, title, form_no, applicant_id, applicant_name, current_handler_id, current_handler_name, status, reason, amount, start_date, end_date, submit_time, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{processType}, #{title}, #{formNo}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{currentHandlerId}, #{currentHandlerName}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{amount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
